summary: Diff adds a new UEi DL589 Multimeter Guide component and wires a new view route into StudyTab/StudySystemHome, but the provided truncated diff does not show enough evidence that the Study home card exists, nor that the guide contains all 10 required function sections and all required subsections per section.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a new Study module under "Tools & Instruments" titled "UEi DL589 Multimeter Guide" that is accessible from the Study home screen, without modifying other existing Study modules.
missing_requirements.reason: Navigation/view state for 'uei-dl589-guide' is added, but the diff excerpt for the Study home screen is truncated before showing a new module card under "Tools & Instruments" labeled "UEi DL589 Multimeter Guide".

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement the "UEi DL589 Multimeter Guide" as structured, cleanly formatted educational content with 10 distinct sections for the listed functions (VAC, VDC, AC Amps, DC Amps, Resistance, Continuity, Capacitance, Temperature, Frequency, Differential temperature).
missing_requirements.reason: The new guide file shows the module header and the beginning of Section 1 (AC Voltage), but the remainder is truncated; there is no visible evidence in the diff summary that all 10 required sections are implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: For each of the 10 function sections, include subsections: When to use it, Power ON/OFF rules, HVAC-specific examples, Common mistakes, and Safety warnings.
missing_requirements.reason: Section 1 visibly includes several required subsections (e.g., When to Use It, Power ON/OFF Rules, HVAC-Specific Examples), but the file is truncated before showing completion of Section 1 and any other sections; the diff summary does not provide evidence that every section includes all five required subsections with explicit power rules and safety warnings.

hallucinated_features.description: Project metadata describes adding scenario-based practice questions (and multiple new study modules) as part of this change.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly lists scenario-based practice questions for the UEi DL589 guide as a non-goal, and only requests adding the UEi DL589 guide module; the diff includes an updated project_state summary referencing scenario-based practice questions beyond the request.
